title: Personal information charter
body: " September 2025 - This privacy information notice is under review. The Biometrics and Forensics Ethics Group is now called the Science and Technology Ethics Advisory Committee.   This  BFEG privacy information notice  (PDF, 106 KB, 4 pages) is provided in accordance with data protection legislation which incorporates the General Data Protection Regulations (GDPR) and has been created following the guidance issued by the Information Commissioner’s Office and in consideration of guidance for arms-length bodies published by the Home Office.  "
